Raymond James discovery notes:

- Finder: https://www.raymondjames.com/find-an-advisor
- Sample branch roster: https://www.raymondjames.com/manhattan-branch
- Local runner behavior: direct raymondjames.com requests time out or fail with HTTP/2 protocol errors.
- Public branch roster pages expose advisor profile URLs, headshot URLs, email/tel links, role titles, and branch address.
- The scraper uses direct branch fetch first and falls back to r.jina.ai-rendered public markdown when the Raymond James edge blocks the runner.
